# Empire Data Provenance

## Roman Empire — 117 AD extent

- Local normalized file: `data/empires/roman_empire_ad_117_extent.geojson`
- Local raw source files: `data/raw/roman_empire_ad_117_extent`
- In-app/metadata label:
  - `Extent Roman Empire 117AD`
  - `Rome - Limites des provinces de l'Empire vers 117 EC`

### Source trail

- ArkeOpen thematic layer reference observed at:
  - `https://arkeopen.org/rp=shp%C2%A717&textual=romain&textualOn=dataset-name&shps=17&p=right&lat=44.29242&lng=10.43416&z=3.15&basemap=outdoors`
- ArkeOpen layer metadata for `shp=17` attributes the original files to:
  - `Ancient World Mapping Center`
  - `Extent Roman Empire 117AD`
  - `http://awmc.unc.edu/wordpress/map-files/`
- Access date recorded in the ArkeOpen description:
  - `2023-03-31`

### License lead

- User-provided license link associated with this source trail:
  - `https://opendatacommons.org/licenses/odbl/1-0/`

### Status

- Roman source provenance is partially confirmed through ArkeOpen metadata.
- Commercial-print safety should be treated as provisional until the exact upstream AWMC dataset/license record is matched directly to the local Roman source files.
- If confirmed, record the exact upstream source URL, license text location, and retrieval date here.
